data.description: Societe Generale plans to raise capital for the 2026 Global Employee Share Ownership Programme.

data.title: Turnover spiked by 35% in Q2 2026, thanks to expanded capacity in South Africa and Uzbekistan.
data.description: The latest data reveals that the unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.2%, marking an increase of 0.3% from the previous month. This translates to a total of 10.4 million individuals who are currently unemployed. Furthermore, the report highlights a decrease in job creation, with only 150,000 new jobs added in the last quarter, a significant drop from the previous year. These statistics underscore the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market, as the economy strives to recover from the impact of the pandemic. The government has announced measures to address this issue and support job growth in various sectors.

data.title: China’s Shanxi Province–Malaysia Economic, Trade and Cultural Tourism Exchange Conference Held in Kuala Lumpur
data.description: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, the China’s Shanxi Province–Malaysia Economic, Trade, and Cultural Tourism Exchange Conference took place on July 21. Over 120 delegates from economic, trade, cultural, and tourism fields of China and Malaysia participated. The conference was co-hosted by the Shanxi Provincial Committee of the China Council for the Promotion of International Trade, the Department of Culture and Tourism of Shanxi Province, and the Department of.

data.title: Kylian Mbappé and Jude Bellingham Welcome You to EA SPORTS FC™ 27, Launching Worldwide on September 25
data.description: Electronic Arts, Inc. unveiled the cover of the Ultimate Plus Edition for EA SPORTS FC™ 27, showcasing Kylian Mbappé and Jude Bellingham from Real Madrid post an eventful football season. The game is set for a global release on September 25, 2026, with a first look at the gameplay revealed. The Ultimate Plus Edition will be accessible until August 31st as a limited-time offer.

data.title: OKYO Pharma Announces Purchase of Shares by Director
data.description: On July 23, 2026, OKYO Pharma Limited disclosed that John Brancaccio, the company's Non-Executive Director, acquired 5,000 ordinary shares on NASDAQ priced at $1.48 each. This purchase increased Brancaccio's total holdings to 35,201 shares. OKYO Pharma, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical firm focusing on developing therapies for neuropathic corneal pain and anterior segment eye diseases, operates under the Nasdaq symbol OKYO.

data.title: Join Idorsia's webcast & call on HY 2026 financial results. Details to follow.
data.description: A new study reveals that the global carbon dioxide emissions have reached a record high of 36.8 billion metric tons in 2021, reflecting a 6% increase compared to the previous year. The data highlights the urgent need for more aggressive actions to curb greenhouse gas emissions and address climate change. The report also indicates that China was the largest emitter, contributing 30% of the total emissions, followed by the United States with 14%. The study warns that without immediate and significant efforts to reduce carbon emissions, the world is unlikely to meet the targets set by the Paris Agreement to limit global warming. The findings emphasize the critical importance of adopting sustainable practices and policies to combat the escalating climate crisis.

data.title: Mortgage Rates Average 6.58%
data.description: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, disclosed on July 23, 2026, that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.58% according to its Primary Mortgage Market Survey ® (PMMS ®).

data.description: An equipment lease lasting 36 months is being proposed, with the potential to increase to around $60 million in total contract value.

data.title: Google Stock Falls 7% Amid Questions Over AI Leadership, Gemini 4 Roadmap
data.description: Alphabet's stock, Google, experienced a 7% drop as analysts from Wall Street raised concerns regarding the company's AI leadership, the strategic roadmap for Gemini 4, and the increasing capital expenditure following the release of the Q2 earnings report.

data.title: FCX Stock Falls Amid Soft Q3 Outlook As Copper Price Slips
data.description: FCX reduced its sales forecast for the third quarter but anticipates a significant improvement for the fourth quarter. The company's stock price dropped in response to the soft outlook for Q3 due to a decline in copper prices.

data.title: Elon Musk Preaches Patience On Robotaxi, Optimus Rollout. Tesla Stock Plummets.
data.description: During the second-quarter earnings report, Elon Musk shared some new information regarding robotaxis and Optimus. Following the updates, Tesla's stock price dropped by over 13%. Musk emphasized the importance of patience in the rollout of these technologies.

data.title: JPMorgan: Google 2027 Capital Spending Could Boom Near $400 Billion
data.description: The stock of Google experienced a decline following Alphabet's revelation of its first-ever negative free cash flow. This was attributed to the increasing expenditure on artificial intelligence as the company continues to witness significant growth in its cloud services. According to JPMorgan, Google's capital spending for the year 2027 could surge to nearly $400 billion, indicating a substantial investment in future projects and expansions.

data.title: The 'Standout Performance' That Could Save Thermo Fisher, Danaher And Others
data.description: On Thursday, Thermo Fisher stock spearheaded a recovery in the medtech sector, alleviating concerns of prolonged stagnation in medical research and tools. This standout performance signaled hope for Thermo Fisher, Danaher, and similar companies amidst market uncertainty.
